name: Bo-Mi Yun
description: **Height:** 174cm Bo-Mi is the female lead of Seasons of Blossom spring arc. Appears in summer, autumn and winter arc. She's tall and is considered to be a beauty. She's also a good student and friendly to everyone, so she is quite popular in school. [Seon-Hui](https://anilist.co/character/210936/SeonHui-Kang)'s best friend. In [Cheongchun Lovesome](https://anilist.co/manga/181542/Cheongchun-Lovesome/) she is 20 y.o.

name: Chihiro Uomi
description: The president of Eiryou High School's Student Council.

name: Chouji Tomiyama
description: The leader of Shishitoren. He believes that the stronger someone is, the more free they are. Tomiyama wants to create a fun environment for Shishitoren, where members can feel the most free they've ever felt. Always a bit fidgety and impatient, he charges into things even by himself, no matter where he goes. He's obsessed with Umemiya, his counterpart at the top in Bofurin, as Umemiya always looks like he's having fun. (Source: WIND BREAKER Official Website)

name: Dion Agriche
description: Deon is very intelligent and ruthless, even compared to the other Agriche children. He rarely shows emotions unless it is involving his half-sister Roxana Agriche, but has shown to be as sadistic as his parents when he attacked Cassis Pedelian. Dion is Lant and Maria's child. Like all children of the Agriche, he went through the same education. He is responsible of the death of Achille Agriche.

name: Ekaterina Kurae
description: A little Russian girl, no more than ten years old and with the beauty of a doll, she arrives in Japan shortly after the beginning of the war of the Qwasers. While she is presented as extremely shy and child-like, befitting her age (she has a habit of addressing herself in third person in these instances), her true colors depicts her as a domineering, arrogant, prideful and almost malicious queen, all maintaining a facade of childish innocence. She is a powerful Qwaser who wields the element of c
mediaTitles: Seikon no Qwaser: Jotei no Shouzou

name: Garm
description: Garm (ガルム, Garumu) is a very arrogant and brash man looking for thrills in fighting. He is quite intrigued by Thorfinn due to recognizing his prowess in combat and possibly being the fight he so long sought after.

name: Hinata Kuraue
description: __Height:__ 155 cm Hinata is an exhuberant, energetic girl who used to go on long hikes together with Aoi when they were both kids. However, that came to an end when Aoi had her accident. Still, with high school starting, she once again saw the opportunity to reignite Aoi's interest in hiking, so she went for it.

name: Irene
description: Claymore number three (before Priscilla number two) of the 77th generation, she is known as "Quick Sword Irene", capable of lashing out innumerable lightning fast sword strikes by accumulating all her Youki energy in her sword arm. ~!Even thought she was considered dead by the Organization, she merely lost an arm from the encounter with the Awakaned Priscilla. She saves Clare from Ophelia and teaches her the Quick Sword technique. Irene gives Clare her right arm, so she can control her technique

name: Lyon Vastia
description: Lyon is a former student of Ur. Like Gray, Ur trained him when he was a child to use ice magic. Since meeting Ur he came to desire surpassing her at all costs, reading her magic books in secret to learn spells more powerful than what she was teaching him. After Ur gave her life to save Gray from Deliora by encasing it in ice, Lyon blamed Gray for depriving him of his chance to surpass her. Lyon performs his ice magic with one hand, a faster though less reliable alternative to Gray's two-hand mag

name: M4 SOPMOD II
description: M4 SOPMOD II prefers to be called “SOP-II”, since she finds her full name too long. She is a enthusiastic and motivated T-Doll who loves fighting and being with friends and is a self-admitted sadist with an irrepressible urge to torture and collect the body parts of her enemies. According to SOP-II herself, this applies not only to Sangvis Ferri units, but to any enemy of her allies, as she is primarily motivated with protecting her friends and punishing “villains” rather than fighting for its o

name: Mao
description: Mallow is a student at the Pokémon School on Melemele Island and one of Ash's former classmates. She is an upbeat and friendly girl who gets along well with her classmates at the Pokémon School. She admits herself to be so energetic that she sometimes misses important details and jumps to the wrong conclusions. She has a firm sense of right and wrong, and is also a talented cook for both people and Pokémon, and as such is a self-proclaimed poster girl at her family's restaurant.

name: Masaki Sonoue
description: Producer of the Mayonaka Punch channel. She is in charge of planning, filming, and editing the videos single-handedly. Her biggest problem is her selfish nature, which caused her falling out with her previous channel "Hyped-up Sisters."

name: Medhi
description: ~!Her real name is Elise.!~

name: Meroko Yui
description: Together with her partner and love interest, Takuto Kira, Meroko Yui is a part of the shinigami team Negi Ramen, sent to collect the soul of 12-year-old Mitsuki Kouyama. Meroko is a rabbit shinigami with long ears, and she is capable of transforming into an anthropomorphic bunny stuffed toy. name: Midori Imai
description: Aspiring scriptwriter and university student. The highly enthusiastic Midori is a former member of her high school animation club.

name: Natsumi Raimon
description: She is the daughter of the chairman of the school and is the student body council president. She becomes a manager because of Endo's passion for soccer. She is shown to have a romantic interest in Endo and strongly believes that he is the best goalkeeper around. Natsumi's personality is like she likes to help out, but does not like to get her hands dirty. At first, she seems very much against the Raimon soccer club and is dead-set on disbanding it, often setting challenges for them to overcome w

name: Neopolitan
description: __Race:__ Human __Weapon:__ Hush __Height:__ 147 cm (in heels) Neopolitan, more commonly known as Neo, is an antagonist and associate to Roman Torchwick. Neo's weapon of choice is hush, an umbrella with a concealed blade. Neopolitan's Semblance is named Overactive Imagination, which allows her to create "physical illusions that can be seen by everyone". These illusions are highly convincing and shatter like glass when she dispels them or someone breaks them.

name: Ramlethal Valentine
nativeName: ラムレザル・ヴァレンタイン

name: Ran Shibuki
description: Ran Shibuki is a Starlight Academy student and one of Ichigo and Aoi's classmates. Ran is a quiet, independent girl with a professional air about her. She is multi-talented and mature but she has a short temper and does not like being pestered. Despite this, Ran is a kind person. She is humble about who she is as a person and idol, despite her popularity.

name: Rita
description: Rita is a young child who lives in Nebelville, and is the daughter of the village doctor. She has short black hair and bangs, and usually wears a lopsided hat. She has somewhat of a quiet and timid personality. ~!She is actually a young necromancer. One day a monster invaded the village and killed everyone, leaving her as the only survivor of the massacre.
